data.title: How do I track my order?
data.description:
You can track your order in real-time from the 'My Orders' section in the app.

Tap on the active order to see the live tracking map, estimated delivery time, and the name of your delivery partner.

data.title: My order was cancelled. What happens to my payment?
data.description:
If your order was cancelled after payment, a full refund will be initiated within 5-7 business days to your original payment method.

For wallet payments, the refund is instant.

data.title: I received a wrong or incomplete order
data.description:
We apologise for the inconvenience. Please report the issue within 24 hours of delivery.

We will investigate and either arrange a replacement or process a refund based on the situation.

data.title: How do I cancel my order?
data.description:
You can cancel your order from the 'My Orders' section before the restaurant accepts it.

Once the restaurant has accepted the order, cancellation may not be possible or a cancellation fee may apply.

data.title: My payment failed but money was deducted
data.description:
This can happen due to a temporary technical issue between the payment gateway and your bank.

In most cases, the amount is automatically reversed within 5-7 business days. If not, please contact us with your transaction ID.
